requirement_topic.en: CRSE / Senelec Storage and Grid-Connection Review

summary.en: CRSE describes Senegal's electricity sector as structured around Senelec, independent power producers, and rural electrification operators, and identifies IPPs as authorized title holders that may develop, finance, build, operate, and maintain production or storage installations. A grid-connected BESS should therefore be treated as an electricity-sector project and interconnection matter involving CRSE, Senelec, and project-specific authorization or contract terms, not only an imported battery product.
summary.zh: CRSE说明塞内加尔电力行业围绕Senelec、独立发电商和农村电气化运营商构成，并将IPP描述为持有获授权经营 title、可开发、融资、建设、运营和维护发电或储能设施的主体。因此，并网BESS应作为涉及CRSE、Senelec及项目特定授权或合同条款的电力行业项目和并网事项处理，而不仅是进口电池产品。
summary.zht: CRSE說明塞內加爾電力行業圍繞Senelec、獨立發電商和農村電氣化營運商構成，並將IPP描述為持有獲授權經營 title、可開發、融資、建設、營運和維護發電或儲能設施的主體。因此，併網BESS應作為涉及CRSE、Senelec及項目特定授權或合同條款的電力行業項目和併網事項處理，而不僅是進口電池產品。

standards_or_laws: CRSE electricity-sector regulation and investor route
Senelec transmission, distribution, dispatch, metering, and commissioning requirements
Project-specific authorization, PPA, grid-connection agreement, or concession terms

summary.en: China-side grid and system evidence commonly includes GB/T 36558-2023, PCS test reports, protection settings, power-quality studies, and grid-company acceptance records. These documents can support engineering review but do not substitute for Senegal interconnection studies, Senelec settings, CRSE authorization, or project commissioning acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网和系统证据通常包括GB/T 36558-2023、PCS测试报告、保护整定、电能质量研究和电网公司验收记录。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能替代塞内加尔并网研究、Senelec整定、CRSE授权或项目调试验收。
summary.zht: 中國側併網和系統證據通常包括GB/T 36558-2023、PCS測試報告、保護整定、電能品質研究和電網公司驗收記錄。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能替代塞內加爾併網研究、Senelec整定、CRSE授權或項目調試驗收。

gap.en: Prepare a Senegal-specific interconnection dossier covering single-line diagrams, grid model, protection and relay settings, anti-islanding, fault ride-through where requested, harmonics, grounding, metering, SCADA/telecontrol, dispatch interface, commissioning tests, and French operating procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备塞内加尔专用并网档案，覆盖单线图、电网模型、保护和继电器整定、防孤岛、适用时的故障穿越、谐波、接地、计量、SCADA/远动、调度接口、调试测试和法文运行程序。
gap.zht: 應準備塞內加爾專用併網檔案，覆蓋單線圖、電網模型、保護和繼電器整定、防孤島、適用時的故障穿越、諧波、接地、計量、SCADA／遠動、調度接口、調試測試和法文運行程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected storage projects where CRSE authorization, Senelec interconnection, PPA, concession, utility review, or commissioning acceptance applies; details are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Commission de Régulation du Secteur de l'Energie (CRSE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BESS battery certificate does not close the Senegal grid gap; CRSE, Senelec, contract, and commissioning expectations should be addressed before energization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BESS电池证书不能覆盖塞内加尔并网差距；送电前应处理CRSE、Senelec、合同和调试验收要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BESS電池證書不能覆蓋塞內加爾併網差距；送電前應處理CRSE、Senelec、合同和調試驗收要求。
